objectives: Build the mx20022-cli crate with inspect, validate, and codegen subcommands
Pass cargo check/clippy/test/fmt for the full workspace
important_facts: mx20022-parse exposes envelope::detect_message_type returning MessageId{family, msg_id, variant, version}
mx20022-validate exposes RuleRegistry::with_defaults() (IBAN_CHECK, BIC_CHECK) and SchemaValidator
mx20022-codegen pipeline: xsd::parse(BufReader) -> ir::lower(&schema) -> emit::emit(&graph) -> String
mx20022-model has features: head, pacs, pain, camt, all
validate command uses lightweight XML text scanning (not typed deserialization) to avoid feature-gated model types
BIC validation: tags BICFI, BIC; IBAN validation: tag IBAN
Integration tests use CARGO_BIN_EXE_mx20022-cli env var to locate binary
rustfmt.toml uses nightly-only settings (imports_granularity) — warns but does not fail on stable
decisions_made: Used Box<dyn std::error::Error> in main() to unify heterogeneous error types from each command module: avoids a top-level error enum while keeping each command's error type focused
validate command scans raw XML with simple string search rather than typed deserialization: command is message-version-agnostic and avoids coupling to feature-gated generated types
Each command module defines its own error enum implementing std::error::Error: clear error provenance, no cross-command dependencies

iteration.summary: Built the mx20022-cli crate from scratch. Added three subcommands: inspect (detects and displays message type from XML), validate (scans XML for IBAN/BIC fields and runs rule validation), codegen (XSD -> IR -> Rust source via mx20022-codegen pipeline). Updated Cargo.toml to add mx20022-codegen and mx20022-model dependencies. Wrote 9 integration tests exercising all three commands against real fixtures. Added two pacs fixture files to testdata/. All checks pass: cargo check, clippy, test, fmt.
next_actions: Consider adding --quiet / --json output modes for machine-readable validation results
Consider adding a translate subcommand once mx20022-translate is implemented
Add scheme-specific validation (FedNow, SEPA, CBPR) once mx20022-validate scheme modules are built
